entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
PATCHY FOG AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
